name: threads-of-grace
description: A contemplative website showcasing Pat Horn's spiritual meditations on the Sunday lectionary readings.

scripts.encrypt-family: staticrypt family/index.html family/stories-mom-told.html family/stories-mom-wrote.html family/family-history.html family/family-tree.html family/memorial-video.html --remember 30 -t family/password-template.html --template-title 'Horn Family' --template-button 'Enter' --template-instructions 'This area is for family members.' --template-error 'Incorrect password. Please try again.' --template-placeholder 'Family password' -d family --short
